evidence: "If you love God and you believe in the invested power of the Holy Spirit..."
"I ordered Faith Like Potatoes looking for some christian entertainment..."
"It's clean and the only hints of evil are normally the evil the 'Avengers' are fighting and defeating."
"Good scenery, pretty good acting, little scriptural truth."
"It's a good long movie with plenty of viewing for one long or two shorter evenings of viewing."
"I can watch it over and over."
"The quality has been good. I enjoy the atmosphere the flavor of the times and of England and France."
"The video (DVD) is well done, and brings you close to the moment."
"I didn't find the portrayal of the miracles was very well done."
"I liked this video, but I was disappointed by the fairly flagrant disregard for Biblical record."
"I find myself comparing what I see to what I've read and thus strengthening my knowledge of the scriptures themselves."
"The movie is great entertainment and is inspiring."
"It encouraged me and I enjoyed the watching of it."

summary: The user has a strong preference for Christian and family-oriented content, often valuing emotional and spiritual engagement. They appreciate high production quality and tend to favor slower-paced narratives that allow for reflection and connection to their faith.
